content:
# Session 319 (review of iter-319)

## Metadata
- Lanes: **FBC** (`Cohomology/CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean`), **D3′** (`Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/PullbackTensorComp.lean`). Both builds GREEN (`lake env lean` EXIT 0).
- Sorry deltas:
  - FBC: 3 → 4 sorry-bearing decls (L154 `pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` untouched; L438 NEW helper `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange`; L520 natIso naturality; L576/577 twisted app+naturality). Both leaf **`app` layers now compiling code** (coproduct/product decomposition landed).
  - D3′: 1 → 1 sorry (`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` L879), **+3 NEW axiom-clean decls** (`pullbackValIso_eq_sheafCompPb`, `sheafCompPb_counit_comp_coherence`, `pullbackValIso_comp`).
  - Global: net **+1 sorry**, but the iter is structurally net-positive (3 new closed decls in D3′; the FBC "+1" is an *extraction* of the per-σ residual from inside a previously-opaque leaf).

## FBC — leaf wiring (PARTIAL, substantial)
STEP 1 (sanctioned floor) RESOLVED: both leaves + the whole consumer chain (`cechComplex_baseChange_cosimplicialIso`, `cechComplex_baseChange_iso`, `cech_flatBaseChange`) signature-extended to `[Finite 𝒰.I₀][IsSeparated f][IsAffine S][IsAffine S'][∀ i, IsAffine (𝒰.X i)]` (twisted leaf omits base affineness). Verified: no external `.lean` consumes these as terms → propagation fully contained, file green. Auditor fix: `qcoh_iso_tilde_sections_qcoh` → `qcoh_iso_tilde_sections` in 3 docstrings.

STEP 2 (the real content) — **key discovery**: the degree-`n` fibre power `Yₙ = (coverCechNerveOver 𝒰).obj (op n)` is the coproduct `∐_σ U_σ` over tuples `σ : Fin (n.len+1) → 𝒰.I₀` of intersection opens `U_σ = coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ`. The sorry-free `CechSectionIdentificationBase.pushPull_sigma_iso` (needs `[Finite 𝒰.I₀]`) gives `pushPullObj F Yₙ ≅ ∏_σ pushPullObj F (Over.mk j_σ)`, and both `pushforward`/`pullback` preserve the finite product (`Limits.PreservesProduct.iso` resolves instances). So each leaf's `app` reduces *mechanically* to a per-σ single-open base change.
- **S-level leaf `cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso`**: `app n` is fully-built 7-step compiling iso (see milestones); only residual = the named per-σ helper `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` + the naturality `fun φ => sorry`.
- **X-level leaf `twisted_cech_nerve_iso`**: LHS product layer built; RHS-match BLOCKED — needs `(pushPull_sigma_iso 𝒰' (g'^* F) n.len).symm` for base-changed cover `𝒰'`, requiring `[Finite 𝒰'.I₀]`/`[∀ i, IsAffine (𝒰'.X i)]` NOT in scope (verified: instance synthesis fails). Needs the geometric cover-base-change `coverInterOpen 𝒰' σ = g'⁻¹(U_σ)` (or affineness on the base-changed cover).
- New helper `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (L438): crisp per-σ statement `g^*(f_*(p_*p^*F)) ≅ f'_*(g'^*(p_*p^*F))`, dischargeable via iter-318 bridge altitude-2 (`S = Spec R` via `S.isoSpec`) + sorry-free `cech_degree_affine_baseChange`. Body = the genuine multi-hundred-LOC affine-reduction heart.

## D3′ — Sq4 chain (SOLVED ×3, axiom-clean) + assembly residual
The effort-broken Sq4 chain (3 pins) ALL closed, axiom-clean, matching the planner's `\lean{}` pins exactly (no ad-hoc top-level helpers):
- `pullbackValIso_eq_sheafCompPb` (L632): `rfl` — it IS the def's composite.
- `sheafCompPb_counit_comp_coherence` (L653): the substantive engine. 3 moves — counit half (slide `ε` across `pullbackComp.inv` by naturality), sheafified-presheaf half (consume closed Sq1 `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` via `Iso.inv_comp_eq` + an explicit `Tiso` palindrome so cancellation is `Iso.hom_inv_id`), fold `map_comp`. **Load-bearing pitfalls** (banked): (i) `a_Z.map (𝟙 _)` must NEVER form — detonates the Scheme/Sheaf-site defeq; the `Tiso` reformulation sidesteps it; (ii) `NatIso.app` does not exist — build the component `Iso.mk` by hand; (iii) `PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp`'s composite ring map is INFERRED — do not spell it; (iv) needs `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false`.
- `pullbackValIso_comp` (L732): 3-step corollary refolding through the engine; derived a **fully-explicit Ψ** (directly consumable, unlike the abstract blueprint Ψ).

`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (L879) PARTIAL: exact 4-vs-13 factor goal obtained; all four square coherences now in-file (Sq1/Sq2b/Sq4 closed; Sq3 to wire). Not closed because the squares **interleave** — no single square rewritable in isolation while green. Remaining = ~100–300 LOC interleaved mate-calculus paste needing per-step goal tracking; intractable blind (LSP times out, 9-min builds). Next-iter method: the **fast scratch loop** (import prebuilt TOS olean, ~15–35s; reproduce `restrict` with the 4 squares as sorry-haves).

## Subagent findings (full reports under task_results/)
- **lean-auditor** (`audit-319`): structurally sound, 0 laundering, no axioms. All 6 sorries sit on genuinely-OPEN decls. The 3 new PTC decls genuine (rfl / full proof / clean corollary), axiom-clean. **3 MAJOR = stale `.lean` comments** (FBC docstring "three named leaves" → now four; PTC docstring "Sq4 still to build" → closed; stale "left for follow-up" inside the already-closed `pullbackComp_δ`). Review can't edit `.lean` → flagged to planner/prover.
- **lvb-fbc-319**: leaf signatures faithfully match blueprint (PASS, no weakening). 2 MAJOR: `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` has zero `\lean{}` block (unmatched); leaf proofs under-specify (never preview the product decomposition or the `𝒰'`-affineness obstruction). MINOR: `[Finite 𝒰.I₀]` absent from prose. 0 must-fix.
- **lvb-ptc-319**: Lean decls correct & proof-closed (confirms the `\leanok` override below). 2 MAJOR **blueprint-side prose** errors: the Sq4-chain block displays `pullbackComp h f` with a backwards orientation (Mathlib `Sheaf.lean:232` is `h*∘f*≅(h∘f)*`, so Lean correctly uses `.inv` not `.hom`) and an RHS factored through the wrong altitude/object. MINOR: stale "Sq1 is the open target" prose. 0 must-fix. → writer pass owed.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullbackValIso_eq_sheafCompPb`: added `\leanok` (stmt+proof). **Override justified**: decl `pullbackValIso_eq_sheafCompPb` (L632) is sorry-free (`rfl`); confirmed by the prover's green 9-min `lake env lean` build (only PTC code sorry is L879) AND independently by lean-auditor + lvb-ptc-319. `sync_leanok` ran this iter (sha 96153df3) but `chapters_touched` lists ONLY `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex` — the PTC chapter was never processed (the 9-min PTC module build did not complete within sync's allotment), so it is a sync coverage gap, not a "decl incomplete" verdict.
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:sheafCompPb_counit_comp_coherence`: added `\leanok` (stmt+proof). Same justification (L653, sorry-free, full categorical proof).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullbackValIso_comp_coherence`: added `\leanok` (stmt+proof). Same justification (L732, sorry-free corollary).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`: stripped 3 now-stale `% NOTE: ...the iter-319 prover will create...` annotations (the decls now exist under the exact pin names).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:sheafCompPb_counit_comp_coherence`: added a `% NOTE` flagging the lvb-ptc-319 blueprint-prose orientation/RHS error for the next writer pass.

## Notes (LOW)
- `mapAlternatingCofaceMapComplexIso` is `private` while `\lean{}`-referenced (pre-existing, NOTE-acknowledged; bp318 flagged for dedup soon).
- Blueprint-doctor: 0 orphan chapters; broken `\cref/\uses` only in held `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2) + `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13) — off the active front (see recommendations).
